Class AbstractAsiContainer

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.event.BasicPropertyChangeSource
uno.anahata.asi.AbstractAsiContainer
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyChangeSource, Rebindable
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractSwingAsiContainer
public abstract class AbstractAsiContainer extends BasicPropertyChangeSource
A hybrid static/instance class for managing global and application-specific configurations.
  • Static methods provide access to the root Anahata AI working directory and its global subdirectories.
  • An instance of this class represents the configuration for a specific host application (e.g., "netbeans", "standalone"), managing its unique preferences and its own application-specific subdirectories.
Author:
anahata-gemini-pro-2.5

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final List<Agi>
    activeAgis
    The list of currently active agi sessions managed by this container.
    static Map
    applicationAttributes
    A JVM-scoped map for tools to store and share objects across all containers, sessions, and turns.
    Map
    containerAttributes
    A container-scoped map for tools to store objects across all sessions and turns within this specific host application.
    private final ExecutorService
    executor
    A shared executor for container-level background tasks.
    private final String
    hostApplicationId
    The unique identifier for the host application (e.g., "netbeans", "standalone").
    private final AsiContainerPreferences
    preferences
    The persistent preferences for this container instance.
    private final Map<String, AbstractAiProvider>
    providerRegistry
    A master registry of AI provider instances.

    Description

    Performs an automatic backup of the session using Kryo serialization.

    Authoritatively requests that the specified agi session's UI tab or window be closed.

    Hook invoked to perform initial post-birth configuration of a new Agi.

    Authoritatively creates, configures, registers, and opens a brand-new Agi session using the user's preferred template.

    Authoritatively creates, configures, registers, and opens a brand-new Agi session with the provided configuration.

    Creates a new agi session blueprint.

    Permanently disposes of a agi session, shutting it down and moving its serialized file to the 'disposed' directory.

    Surgically ensures that a given directory path exists on disk, creating all necessary parent directories if they are missing.

    getActiveAgis()
    Gets an unmodifiable list of all active agi sessions.
    List<AbstractAiProvider>
    getAllProviders()
    Gets an unmodifiable list of all registered provider instances.
    Path
    getAppDir()
    Gets the root working directory for this specific host application instance. e.g., ~/.anahata/asi/netbeans
    Path
    getAppDirSubDir(String name)
    Gets a named subdirectory within this host application's working directory, creating it if it doesn't exist. e.g., ~/.anahata/asi/netbeans/sessions

    getChildrenAgis(String parentUuid)
    Retrieves all active Agi sessions spawned by a specific parent.
    Path

    Gets the directory where disposed agi sessions are moved.

    Gets an unmodifiable list of all agi sessions that are currently logically open in the host UI.

  • Field Details

    • hostApplicationId

      private final String hostApplicationId
      The unique identifier for the host application (e.g., "netbeans", "standalone").

      Used to resolve application-specific subdirectories within the root Anahata working directory.

    • preferences

      private final AsiContainerPreferences preferences
      The persistent preferences for this container instance.

    • activeAgis

      private final List<Agi> activeAgis
      The list of currently active agi sessions managed by this container.

    • providerRegistry

      private final Map<String, AbstractAiProvider> providerRegistry
      A master registry of AI provider instances.

      Keyed by the provider's unique UUID. These instances are shared across all sessions managed by this container.

    • executor

      private final ExecutorService executor
      A shared executor for container-level background tasks.

    • applicationAttributes

      public static Map applicationAttributes
      A JVM-scoped map for tools to store and share objects across all containers, sessions, and turns. This map is thread-safe.

    • containerAttributes

      public Map containerAttributes
      A container-scoped map for tools to store objects across all sessions and turns within this specific host application. This map is thread-safe.

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractAsiContainer

      public AbstractAsiContainer(String hostApplicationId)
      Creates a configuration instance for a specific host application. Upon instantiation, it loads the preferences for that application.
      Parameters:
      hostApplicationId - A unique identifier for the host application (e.g., "netbeans").

  • Method Details

    • getProvider

      public AbstractAiProvider getProvider(String uuid)
      Retrieves a shared provider instance from the master registry by its UUID.

      Implementation details: This is the authoritative way to resolve providers. If the UUID is null, this method returns null.

      Parameters:
      uuid - The unique UUID of the provider instance.
      Returns:
      The shared provider instance, or null if not found.

    • getAllProviders

      public List<AbstractAiProvider> getAllProviders()
      Gets an unmodifiable list of all registered provider instances.
      Returns:
      All providers.

    • registerProvider

      public void registerProvider(@NonNull @NonNull AbstractAiProvider provider)
      Registers a new provider instance in the master registry and persists it to preferences.
      Parameters:
      provider - The provider instance to register.

    • unregisterProvider

      public void unregisterProvider(String uuid)
      Unregisters a provider instance, removing it from the registry and the persistent preferences.
      Parameters:
      uuid - The UUID of the provider to unregister.

    • getProviderByClass

      public <T extends AbstractAiProvider> T getProviderByClass(Class<T> providerClass)
      Finds a registered provider instance of a specific class.
      Type Parameters:
      T - The provider type.
      Parameters:
      providerClass - The class to look for.
      Returns:
      The first matching instance, or null if none registered.

    • savePreferences

      public void savePreferences()
      Saves the current preferences for this host application to disk.

    • getAppDir

      public Path getAppDir()
      Gets the root working directory for this specific host application instance. e.g., ~/.anahata/asi/netbeans
      Returns:
      The application-specific working directory path.

    • getAppDirSubDir

      public Path getAppDirSubDir(String name)
      Gets a named subdirectory within this host application's working directory, creating it if it doesn't exist. e.g., ~/.anahata/asi/netbeans/sessions
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the subdirectory.
      Returns:
      The Path to the application-specific subdirectory.

    • createNewAgiConfig

      public abstract AgiConfig createNewAgiConfig()
      Creates a new agi session blueprint. Overridden by concrete containers to provide product-specific configurations (e.g., NetBeansAgiConfig).
      Returns:
      The new agi configuration.

    • hasAnyProviderConfigured

      public boolean hasAnyProviderConfigured()
      Checks if any of the AI providers configured in the global template have at least one valid API key.
      Returns:
      true if keys are configured, false otherwise.

    • createNewAgi

      public final Agi createNewAgi()
      Authoritatively creates, configures, registers, and opens a brand-new Agi session using the user's preferred template.
      Returns:
      The newly created and opened Agi session.

    • createNewAgi

      public final Agi createNewAgi(AgiConfig config)
      Authoritatively creates, configures, registers, and opens a brand-new Agi session with the provided configuration.

      Implementation details: This method orchestrates the creation, initial setup, pooling, and initial opening in one atomic weld. It is the primary entry point for spawning new intelligence instances.

      Parameters:
      config - The session configuration.
      Returns:
      The newly created and opened Agi session.

    • onProviderKeysChanged

      public void onProviderKeysChanged(String uuid)
      Notifies all active sessions that the API keys for a specific provider have been updated.
      Parameters:
      uuid - The UUID of the provider whose keys changed.

    • open

      public void open(@NonNull @NonNull Agi agi)
      authoritatively requests that the specified agi session be opened and brought to the front in the host UI.
      Parameters:
      agi - The agi session to open.

    • close

      public void close(@NonNull @NonNull Agi agi)
      Authoritatively requests that the specified agi session's UI tab or window be closed.
      Parameters:
      agi - The agi session to close.

    • getUI

      public abstract Object getUI(Agi agi)
      Retrieves the platform-specific UI component associated with an Agi session.
      Parameters:
      agi - The session.
      Returns:
      The UI component (e.g., AgiPanel or AgiTopComponent).

    • registerInternal

      private void registerInternal(Agi agi)
      Internal logic for session pooling and common hook invocation.
      Parameters:
      agi - The session to register.

    • cloneSession

      public Agi cloneSession(@NonNull @NonNull Agi agi)
      Authoritatively clones an existing Agi session.

      Implementation details: Performs a deep clone using Kryo, assigns a new unique session ID, and updates the nickname. By placing this logic in the core container, we ensure architectural purity across different UI frameworks.

      Parameters:
      agi - The source Agi session to clone.
      Returns:
      The newly cloned and registered Agi session.

    • registerSession

      public void registerSession(Agi agi)
      Registers a newly spawned or cloned Agi session with this container.
      Parameters:
      agi - The session to register.

    • unregister

      public void unregister(Agi agi)
      Unregisters a agi session from this configuration and triggers host-aware cleanup hooks.
      Parameters:
      agi - The agi session to unregister.

    • getActiveAgis

      public List<Agi> getActiveAgis()
      Gets an unmodifiable list of all active agi sessions.
      Returns:
      The list of active agis.

    • getChildrenAgis

      public List<Agi> getChildrenAgis(String parentUuid)
      Retrieves all active Agi sessions spawned by a specific parent.
      Parameters:
      parentUuid - The UUID of the parent session.
      Returns:
      A list of child sessions.

    • getOpenAgis

      public List<Agi> getOpenAgis()
      Gets an unmodifiable list of all agi sessions that are currently logically open in the host UI.
      Returns:
      The list of open agis.

    • onAgiRegistered

      public void onAgiRegistered(Agi agi)
      Hook invoked whenever a session enters the active pool.
      Parameters:
      agi - The registered session.

    • onAgiUnregistered

      public void onAgiUnregistered(Agi agi)
      Hook invoked whenever a session is removed from the active pool.
      Parameters:
      agi - The unregistered session.

    • configureNewAgi

      protected void configureNewAgi(Agi agi)
      Hook invoked to perform initial post-birth configuration of a new Agi.

      Implementation details: Applies the global default provider and model from preferences if they are configured.

      Parameters:
      agi - The new session.

    • onAgiOpened

      protected abstract void onAgiOpened(Agi agi)
      Hook invoked when a session has been logically opened.
      Parameters:
      agi - The opened session.

    • onAgiClosed

      protected abstract void onAgiClosed(Agi agi)
      Hook invoked when a session has been logically closed.
      Parameters:
      agi - The closed session.

    • getSessionsDir

      public Path getSessionsDir()
      Gets the directory where active agi sessions are stored.
      Returns:
      The sessions directory path.

    • getSavedSessionsDir

      public Path getSavedSessionsDir()
      Gets the directory where manually saved agi sessions are stored.
      Returns:
      The saved sessions directory path.

    • getDisposedSessionsDir

      public Path getDisposedSessionsDir()
      Gets the directory where disposed agi sessions are moved.
      Returns:
      The disposed sessions directory path.

    • getUnloadableSessionsDir

      public Path getUnloadableSessionsDir()
      Gets the directory where agi sessions that failed to load are moved.
      Returns:
      The unloadable sessions directory path.

    • ensureDirectory

      private void ensureDirectory(Path dir)
      Surgically ensures that a given directory path exists on disk, creating all necessary parent directories if they are missing.
      Parameters:
      dir - The directory path to verify and create.

    • autoSaveSession

      public void autoSaveSession(Agi agi, String reason)
      Performs an automatic backup of the session using Kryo serialization.

      Implementation details: Only proceeds if the agi is in a stable state (IDLE, TOOL_PROMPT, etc.) to prevent serialization during volatile operations like streaming.

      Parameters:
      agi - The agi session to save.
      reason - A description of why the save was triggered.

    • manualSaveSession

      public void manualSaveSession(Agi agi)
      Manually saves the session to the 'saved' directory.
      Parameters:
      agi - The agi session to save.

    • saveSessionTo

      private void saveSessionTo(Agi agi, Path dir)
      Serializes and saves a agi session to a specific directory using Kryo. This method is synchronized on the agi instance to prevent concurrent write issues.
      Parameters:
      agi - The agi session to save.
      dir - The destination directory.

    • dispose

      public void dispose(Agi agi)
      Permanently disposes of a agi session, shutting it down and moving its serialized file to the 'disposed' directory.
      Parameters:
      agi - The agi session to dispose.

    • importSession

      public Agi importSession(Path path)
      Imports a agi session from an external file. The session is assigned a new ID to avoid collisions and registered as a new active agi.
      Parameters:
      path - The path to the serialized session file.
      Returns:
      The imported Agi session, or null if import failed.

    • loadSessions

      public int loadSessions()
      Scan the sessions directory and loads all serialized agi sessions. This is typically called during application startup.
      Returns:
      The number of sessions that failed to load.

    • loadSession

      private boolean loadSession(Path path)
      Loads a single agi session from a file, rebinds it to this container, and registers it.
      Parameters:
      path - The path to the serialized session file.
      Returns:
      true if the session was loaded successfully, false otherwise.

    • shutdown

      public void shutdown()
      Shuts down the container and its shared executor.

    • getWorkDir

      public static Path getWorkDir()
      Gets the root Anahata AI working directory (e.g., ~/.anahata/asi).
      Returns:
      The root working directory path.

    • getWorkDirSubDir

      public static Path getWorkDirSubDir(String name)
      Gets a named subdirectory within the global root working directory, creating it if it doesn't exist. This is used for shared resources like provider configurations. e.g., ~/.anahata/asi/gemini
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the subdirectory.
      Returns:
      The Path object for the subdirectory.
